---
title: "Corrélations fonctionelles - MB-PLS"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "Gaspard Martet - unité EPISABE"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    theme: lumen
    css: "style.css"
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, out.width='100px'}
knitr::include_graphics("C:/Users/g.martet/Documents/Autres/anses.webp")

```

```{r, echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, cache = TRUE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tseries)
library(openxlsx)
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(ggpubr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(pheatmap)
library(Hmisc)
library(corrplot)
library(DT)
library(ggrepel)
library(devtools)
library(FonctionsUtiles)
library(lmtest)
library(mixOmics)
library(bestNormalize)
library(kableExtra)
library(fda)
library(funData)
library(reshape2)
library(ggplotify)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r, echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, cache = TRUE}

dat <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("C:/Users/g.martet/Documents/updatedata/dat.xlsx")
dim(dat)

```


```{r, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = TRUE}

# récupération des variables séléctionées

selvar_AMR_EHPAD_FQ <- c("log_AMC_EHPAD_C3G", "log_AMC_EHPAD_FQ", "log_AMC_EHPAD_macrolides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_penicillines",    
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tetracyclines", "log_AMC_EHPAD_totale",          
"log_AMC_ES_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_carba", "log_AMC_ES_totale",              "log_AMC_ville_C3G", "log_AMC_ville_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_macrolides",      
"log_AMC_ville_penicillines", "log_AMC_ville_tetracyclines",   
"log_AMC_ville_tmp_sulfa", "log_AMC_ville_totale",          
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tot_except_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_tot_except_FQ",   
"log_i041_pib_hab", "veto_by_AC", "veto_by_CV", "veto_by_carni",                 
"prescri_9_inv", "medecin_hab", "couv_creche", "tx_possession_chats",           
"pop_75_plus_prop", "air_NO2_pop", "air_O3_pop", "air_PM10_pop",                  
"air_PM25_pop", "dju_refroi", "log_UGB_density_bovine_all",     "log_UGB_density_bovins_adultes", "log_UGB_density_livestock_tot",  "log_UGB_density_porcs", "log_UGB_density_veaux", "log_UGB_density_volailles",     
"i007b_part_agribio_surf")


selvar_AMR_ES_FQ <- c("log_AMC_EHPAD_C3G", "log_AMC_EHPAD_FQ", "log_AMC_EHPAD_macrolides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_penicillines",        
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tetracyclines", "log_AMC_EHPAD_tmp_sulfa",           
"log_AMC_EHPAD_totale", "log_AMC_ES_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_carba",                   "log_AMC_ES_totale", "log_AMC_ville_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_macrolides",          
"log_AMC_ville_penicillines", "log_AMC_ville_tetracyclines",       
"log_AMC_ville_tmp_sulfa", "log_AMC_ville_totale",              
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tot_except_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_tot_except_FQ",          
"log_AMC_ville_tot_except_FQ", "EQI_st", "log_i041_pib_hab",                   "prop_travail_manuel", "tx_pauvrete_60", "unemployement_pourc",               
"veto_by_CV", "APL_medG", "medecin_hab", "prop_appart",                       
"couv_creche", "tx_possession_chats", "tx_possession_chevaux",              "tx_possession_chiens", "pop_14_moins_prop", "pop_3_moins_prop",                  
"pop_75_plus_prop", "log_pop_density", "air_NO2_pop",                        "air_O3_pop", "air_PM10_pop", "air_PM25_pop", "dju_refroi",                         "log_i033a_part_class_5_eau_sup_nit", "log_UGB_density_SAU_bovine_all",     "log_UGB_density_bovine_all", "log_UGB_density_bovins_adultes",     "log_UGB_density_livestock_tot", "log_UGB_density_ovins",              "log_UGB_density_porcs", "log_UGB_density_veaux",              "log_UGB_density_volailles")

selvar_AMR_ville_FQ <- c("log_AMC_EHPAD_C3G", "log_AMC_EHPAD_FQ", "log_AMC_EHPAD_aminoglycosides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_macrolides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_penicillines", "log_AMC_EHPAD_tmp_sulfa",           
"log_AMC_EHPAD_totale", "log_AMC_ES_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_carba",                   "log_AMC_ES_totale", "log_AMC_ville_C3G", "log_AMC_ville_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_aminoglycosides", "log_AMC_ville_macrolides",          
"log_AMC_ville_penicillines", "log_AMC_ville_tetracyclines",       
"log_AMC_ville_tmp_sulfa", "log_AMC_ville_totale", "log_AMC_EHPAD_tot_except_FQ",     "log_AMC_ES_tot_except_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_tot_except_FQ", "EQI_st", "bac_ou_plus_20_64", "log_i041_pib_hab", "prop_travail_manuel",                "unemployement_pourc", "veto_by_AC", "veto_by_CV", "veto_by_carni",                   "prop_veto_50plus", "APL_medG", "medecin_hab", "prop_tabagisme",                     "tx_possession_chats", "tx_possession_chevaux", "tx_possession_chiens",              
"pop_14_moins_prop", "pop_3_moins_prop", "log_pop_density",                    "air_NO2_pop", "air_O3_pop", "air_PM10_pop", "air_PM25_pop", "resid_FQ_eau_naiades",   "dju_refroi", "log_i033b_part_class_5_eau_sup_pes", "log_UGB_density_SAU_bovine_all", "log_UGB_density_bovine_all", "log_UGB_density_bovins_adultes",     "log_UGB_density_livestock_tot", "log_UGB_density_porcs",              "log_UGB_density_veaux", "log_UGB_density_volailles" )

correspondance_block <- data.frame(block = c( 
rep("AMC", 22), rep("socioeco", 8), rep("soin", 10),
rep("lifestyle", 9), rep("demo", 4), rep("env", 11),
rep("agri", 13)), 
variable = colnames(dat %>% 
                      dplyr::select(-annee, -region, -dplyr::contains("AMR"))))

```

# Corrélations fonctionelles{.tabset} 

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = TRUE}

cor.mtest <- function(mat, ...) {
    mat <- as.matrix(mat)
    n <- ncol(mat)
    p.mat<- matrix(NA, n, n)
    diag(p.mat) <- 0
    for (i in 1:(n - 1)) {
        for (j in (i + 1):n) {
            tmp <- cor.test(mat[, i], mat[, j], ...)
            p.mat[i, j] <- p.mat[j, i] <- tmp$p.value
        }
    }
  colnames(p.mat) <- rownames(p.mat) <- colnames(mat)
  p.mat
}

functional_correlation <- function(var, block, time_period, Nb.Base = 5, y){

## sélectionner le dataset avec que les variables explicatives
library(dplyr)
df.fc.ehpad <- dat[, which(colnames(dat) %in% c("region", "annee", var, y))]
df.fc.ehpad.amc <- df.fc.ehpad %>% 
  dplyr::filter(annee %in% time_period) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(annee = annee %>% factor, region = region %>%  factor)

col_block <- correspondance_block[correspondance_block$block == block,]$variable

df.fc.ehpad.amc <- df.fc.ehpad.amc[,which(colnames(df.fc.ehpad.amc) %in% c("region", "annee", col_block, y))]

# Paramètres
Temps      <- levels(df.fc.ehpad.amc$annee)
NbTemps    <- length(Temps)
VarName    <- colnames(df.fc.ehpad.amc)[-c(1:2)]
NbVar      <- length(VarName)
Regions    <- levels(df.fc.ehpad.amc$region)
NbRegions  <- length(Regions)
my_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "grey", "red"))

# Transformation des variables en matrice
mat.fc.ehpad.amc <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) as.matrix(reshape2:::dcast(df.fc.ehpad.amc, annee  ~ region, value.var = VarName[p])[, -1]))

# transformation en objet fonctionnel
# Base B-spline
Time.01      <- seq(0, 1, length.out = NbTemps)
Nb.base <- 5
spline.basis <- fda::create.bspline.basis(rangeval = c(0, 1), nbasis = Nb.Base, norder = 3)
#plot(spline.basis, lty = 1, lwd = 2, main = "Base de B-splines", xlab = 'Temps')
# Projection des données dans la base
data.amc.fd <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) fda::smooth.basis(Time.01, mat.fc.ehpad.amc[[p]], spline.basis)$fd)
# Format funData
data.amc.fun.uni  <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) funData::funData(Time.01, t(mat.fc.ehpad.amc[[p]])))
data.amc.fun.mult <- funData::multiFunData(data.amc.fun.uni)

# fcpa
# fPCA.amc <-  lapply(1:NbVar, function(p){
# print(VarName[p])
# print(mat.fc.ehpad.amc[[p]])
# MFPCA::MFPCA(multiFunData(data.amc.fun.mult[[p]]), M = 1, uniExpansions = list(list(type = "splines1Dpen", k = 8)), fit = TRUE)})
fPCA.amc <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) fda::pca.fd(data.amc.fd[[p]], nharm = 5, centerfns = TRUE))

# récupérer les proportions de variances expliquées par PC1
propvar.amc <- c()
varname.amc <- c()
for (p in 1:NbVar){
  varname.amc <- c(varname.amc, VarName[p])
  propvar.amc <- c(propvar.amc, fPCA.amc[[p]]$varprop[1])
}

propvar <- cbind.data.frame(variable = varname.amc, 
                 proportion_explained_variance_PC1 = paste0(round(as.numeric(propvar.amc),2)*100, "%"))

# corr fonctionnelle moyennées par temps
cor.bivar <- array(NA, dim = c(NbTemps, NbTemps, NbVar, NbVar))
for (p in 1 : NbVar){
  for (p1 in 1 : NbVar){
    cor.bivar[, , p, p1] <- fda::cor.fd(Time.01, data.amc.fd[[p]], Time.01, data.amc.fd[[p1]])
  }
}

cor.bivar.mean <- as.matrix(apply(cor.bivar, c(3, 4), FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(cor.bivar.mean) <- rownames(cor.bivar.mean) <- VarName

# corr des premières composantes fonctionelles

sum.var <- sapply(1:NbVar, function(p) fPCA.amc[[p]]$scores[, 1, drop = F])
colnames(sum.var) <- VarName
rownames(sum.var) <- Regions

# Matrice de p-value de la corrélation
if (NbVar >1){
M <- cor(sum.var, method = "spearman")
p.mat <- cor.mtest(sum.var)

p.mat.fdr <- matrix(p.adjust(p.mat, method = "fdr"),
                    nrow = nrow(p.mat),
                    ncol = ncol(p.mat))
rownames(p.mat.fdr) <- colnames(p.mat.fdr) <- colnames(p.mat)

numbers <- matrix("", nrow(M), ncol(M))
numbers[p.mat.fdr <= 0.05] <- round(M[p.mat.fdr <= 0.05], 2)

return(list(propvar, cor.bivar.mean, M, p.mat, p.mat.fdr, numbers, sum.var))}

else{
  return(list(propvar, sum.var))
}

}


```

## Evaluation sur données manquantes

Avec la fonction MFPCA du package MFPCA. Dans la matrice Temps x Régions:
- Aucun problème avec un NA isolé dans la matrice
- Sur un time point donné (une ligne), s'il y a plein de NA, pas de problème.
- Si sur une région (une colonne) il y a au moins 2 NA, là ça plante. 

**Pour l'instant, on reprend l'idée de sélectionner uniquement les périodes où on a assez d'observations pour toutes les variables.**

```{r, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = TRUE}

# functional_correlation(var = selvar_AMR_EHPAD_FQ, 
#                        block = "AMC", time_period = 2012:2024)

# var <- selvar_AMR_EHPAD_FQ
# block <- "AMC"
# time_period <- 2012:2024

# [1] "log_AMC_EHPAD_C3G"
#       Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes Bourgogne-Franche-Comte Bretagne Centre-Val de Loire
#  [1,]             1.946039                1.993230 2.087741            1.880078
#  [2,]             1.907897                1.950041 2.036215            1.836018
#  [3,]             1.868242                1.904902 1.981889            1.789927
#  [4,]             1.825418                1.869189 1.935655            1.741802
#  [5,]             1.791723                1.795469 1.847251            1.687039
#  [6,]             1.727337                1.743360 1.794591            1.644676
#  [7,]             1.696855                1.713956 1.738121            1.577052
#  [8,]             1.633286                1.658749 1.628463            1.579985
#  [9,]             1.683279                1.603005 1.582087            1.551724
# [10,]             1.543877                1.516209 1.511505            1.507488
# [11,]             1.570386                1.536787 1.562747            1.425763
# [12,]             1.523775                1.458783 1.502001            1.384111
# [13,]             1.308333                1.193922 1.098612            1.163151
#       Grand Est Hauts-de-France       IDF Normandie Nouvelle-Aquitaine
#  [1,]  2.125956        2.064578 1.8537100  2.071506           2.230342
#  [2,]  2.086010        2.020852 1.8117977  2.029567           2.188230
#  [3,]  2.044403        1.975126 1.7680517  1.985791           2.144267
#  [4,]  1.993733        1.928867 1.7300443  1.943596           2.105895
#  [5,]  1.968399        1.882708 1.6639655  1.889824           2.045584
#  [6,]  1.904846        1.805872 1.6200362  1.834375           1.983442
#  [7,]  1.855658        1.778276 1.5775680  1.794460           1.958827
#  [8,]  1.800088        1.710036 1.5517306  1.768189           1.905139
#  [9,]  1.769945        1.707860 1.6897358  1.739544           1.789678
# [10,]  1.642373        1.620391 1.4430227  1.659502           1.712386
# [11,]  1.639819        1.686886 1.4742510  1.700028           1.720410
# [12,]  1.550294        1.642018        NA  1.643324           1.608984
# [13,]  1.252763        1.410987 0.9555114  1.252763           1.280934
#       Occitanie     PACA Pays de la Loire
#  [1,]  2.211676 2.103400        1.6158203
#  [2,]  2.167022 2.056923        1.5841878
#  [3,]  2.120280 2.008181        1.5515220
#  [4,]  2.072058 1.954809        1.5115904
#  [5,]  2.025619 1.914768        1.4935553
#  [6,]  1.949918 1.827591        1.4439584
#  [7,]  1.916357 1.793593        1.4069491
#  [8,]  1.841372 1.725471        1.3704236
#  [9,]  1.666787 1.713644        1.3594754
# [10,]  1.602343 1.587342        1.2952947
# [11,]  1.627157 1.640353        1.3265467
# [12,]  1.485940 1.567526        1.2880021
# [13,]  1.280934 1.193922        0.8754687
# [1] "log_AMC_EHPAD_FQ"
#       Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes Bourgogne-Franche-Comte  Bretagne
#  [1,]            2.0408077               1.8980539 2.0332272
#  [2,]            1.9760914               1.8530515 1.9615806
#  [3,]            1.9068954               1.8059280 1.8844019
#  [4,]            1.8487064               1.7813321 1.8244732
#  [5,]            1.7346276               1.6802516 1.6778675
#  [6,]            1.6450297               1.6154615 1.5905109
#  [7,]            1.5903982               1.6235765 1.5235203
#  [8,]            1.5207315               1.4355118 1.3653582
#  [9,]            1.5405542               1.3986023 1.3530710
# [10,]            1.4944705               1.4235535 1.3280284
# [11,]            1.4864724               1.4175135 1.3329408
# [12,]            1.4729704               1.4114437 1.3138350
# [13,]            0.8754687               0.9162907 0.7884574
#       Centre-Val de Loire Grand Est Hauts-de-France       IDF Normandie
#  [1,]           1.9444165 2.1655063       2.0852527 1.9268486 2.1137900
#  [2,]           1.8865477 2.0890372       2.0198142 1.8691087 2.0457735
#  [3,]           1.8251232 2.0062329       1.9497917 1.8078295 1.9727910
#  [4,]           1.7414166 1.9335612       1.8884245 1.7547215 1.8988870
#  [5,]           1.7173065 1.7950562       1.7711871 1.6565241 1.8030398
#  [6,]           1.6166344 1.6884038       1.7018058 1.5897226 1.7099330
#  [7,]           1.5202195 1.6049239       1.6176590 1.5283012 1.6181088
#  [8,]           1.4752050 1.5597169       1.5832890 1.4208327 1.5514556
#  [9,]           1.3481711 1.5337417       1.5103426 1.3411192 1.4575088
# [10,]           1.4230168 1.4975555       1.5446562 1.3628898 1.4851313
# [11,]           1.3589584 1.5495737       1.6119480 1.3892171 1.5282114
# [12,]           1.3299835 1.5186591       1.5933636 1.3597345 1.4948191
# [13,]           0.4700036 0.8754687       0.9932518 0.5877867 0.7884574
#       Nouvelle-Aquitaine Occitanie      PACA Pays de la Loire
#  [1,]          2.1125298 2.2129615 2.2344174        1.8826233
#  [2,]          2.0579523 2.1430069 2.1721351        1.8218418
#  [3,]          2.0002233 2.0677880 2.1057146        1.7571254
#  [4,]          1.9496739 2.0024020 2.0449046        1.7104789
#  [5,]          1.8622473 1.8726689 1.9471574        1.5848009
#  [6,]          1.7911806 1.7975631 1.8617114        1.5147355
#  [7,]          1.7421435 1.7055956 1.7983442        1.4701837
#  [8,]          1.6464047 1.5817055 1.6888606        1.3626830
#  [9,]          1.5959076 1.4703528 1.6227393        1.3615659
# [10,]          1.5648660 1.4479970 1.5804119        1.2908850
# [11,]          1.5522657 1.5182075 1.6629366        1.2679727
# [12,]          1.5082968 1.4492005 1.6087580        1.2291469
# [13,]          0.9162907 0.9162907 0.8754687        0.6418539
# [1] "log_AMC_EHPAD_macrolides"
#       Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes Bourgogne-Franche-Comte Bretagne Centre-Val de Loire
#  [1,]             1.862453                1.981056 1.690035            1.729236
#  [2,]             1.841669                1.959060 1.681567            1.738157
#  [3,]             1.820444                1.936569 1.673026            1.746999
#  [4,]             1.818258                1.937713 1.687006            1.772665
#  [5,]             1.749908                1.845202 1.634468            1.729924
#  [6,]             1.745982                1.878665 1.619248            1.789963
#  [7,]             1.745211                1.847708 1.663310            1.781463
#  [8,]             1.746334                1.874959 1.691824            1.835126
#  [9,]             1.781627                1.837323 1.516586            1.717572
# [10,]             1.605716                1.615884 1.452815            1.556096
# [11,]             1.612443                1.709225 1.513677            1.642371
# [12,]                   NA                      NA 1.377831                  NA
# [13,]                   NA                      NA       NA                  NA
#       Grand Est Hauts-de-France      IDF Normandie Nouvelle-Aquitaine Occitanie
#  [1,]  1.942174        1.842128 1.844537  2.055131           1.936353  1.860925
#  [2,]  1.915822        1.833318 1.825835  2.026263           1.920540  1.860736
#  [3,]  1.888757        1.824430 1.806776  1.996536           1.904473  1.860546
#  [4,]  1.874170        1.819997 1.794721  1.969947           1.910636  1.874039
#  [5,]  1.800547        1.799360 1.764446  1.917420           1.824680  1.839673
#  [6,]  1.824705        1.797587 1.730358  1.923021           1.876967  1.859217
#  [7,]  1.768403        1.790246 1.739126  1.858945           1.837983  1.867036
#  [8,]  1.787697        1.750226 1.748046  1.886200           1.828279  1.854445
#  [9,]  1.785026        1.773719 2.007778  1.858914           1.687607  1.744352
# [10,]  1.499194        1.544410 1.528195  1.689297           1.576196  1.612904
# [11,]  1.636729        1.721604 1.688510  1.791273           1.713477  1.770422
# [12,]        NA              NA       NA        NA                 NA        NA
# [13,]        NA              NA       NA        NA                 NA        NA
#           PACA Pays de la Loire
#  [1,] 1.930167         1.767319
#  [2,] 1.922203         1.748594
#  [3,] 1.914175         1.729512
#  [4,] 1.919663         1.732787
#  [5,] 1.868570         1.653306
#  [6,] 1.906193         1.672155
#  [7,] 1.880024         1.660361
#  [8,] 1.865692         1.600326
#  [9,] 2.172106         1.480857
# [10,] 1.963664         1.383805
# [11,] 2.111169         1.450718
# [12,]       NA         1.330750
# [13,]       NA               NA

```

## AMR EHPAD FQ

```{r, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 9, fig.height= 9}

y <- "AMR_EHPAD_FQ_R"

res <- functional_correlation(var = selvar_AMR_EHPAD_FQ, 
                       block = "AMC", time_period = 2018:2022, y = y)

DT::datatable(res[[1]])

ph2 <- pheatmap::pheatmap(res[[3]],
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "grey80", "red"))(100),
         breaks = seq(-1, 1, length.out = 101),
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",  
         number_format = "%.1f",
         fontsize = 11,
         number_color = "white",
         legend = TRUE,
         display_numbers = res[[6]],
         legend_breaks = c(-1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1),
         legend_labels = c("-1", "-0.5", "0", "0.5", "1"),
         main = "Premières composantes fonctionnelles", 
         silent = TRUE)

sum.var <- res[[7]]

# ACP
out.pca <- FactoMineR::PCA(res[[7]], graph = FALSE)
g2 <- factoextra::fviz_pca_biplot(out.pca, repel = TRUE, title = "biplot PCA classique sur les PC1 fonctionelles des variables")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black"))

Y <- as.matrix(res[[7]][,which(colnames(res[[7]]) %in% y)])
X <- as.matrix(res[[7]][,which(!colnames(res[[7]]) %in% y)])

# régression PLS
out.pls <- mixOmics::pls(X, Y)

# Cercle des corrélations
circos <- mixOmics::plotVar(out.pls, legend = TRUE, plot = FALSE)
ind <- mixOmics::plotIndiv(out.pls, plot = FALSE)

ind <- ind$df %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Block == "Block: X") %>% 
  dplyr::select(x, y)
ind$name <- rownames(ind)
ind$Y <- out.pls$Y

#dev.off() # pour fermer le device si nécessaire

circleFun <- function(center = c(0,0), diameter = 2, npoints = 100) {
    r = diameter/2
    tt <- seq(0, 2*pi,length.out = npoints)
    data.frame(x = center[1] + r*cos(tt), y = center[2] + r*sin(tt))
  }
circle <- rbind(circleFun(diameter = 2), circleFun(diameter = 1))

g3 <- ggplot(circos, aes(x = x, y = y, col = Block)) +
    geom_path(aes(x, y), data = circle, col = "gray60", size = .2) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, col = "gray60", size = .3) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, col = "gray60", size = .3) +
    geom_point(size = 1, shape = 3, color = "black", stroke = .1) +
    geom_point(data = ind, aes(x =x, y = y, color = Y), size = 3, shape = 17)+
    scale_colour_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red")+
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = names), size = 3, segment.size  = 0.1,
                    segment.color = "grey50", max.overlaps = 35,
                    show.legend = TRUE, color = "black") +
    geom_text_repel(data = ind, aes(label = name), size = 3, segment.size  = 0.1,
                    segment.color = "grey50", max.overlaps = 35,
                    show.legend = TRUE, color = "blue") +
    labs(title = "Regression PLS - biplot", 
         colour = "PC1 Y") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 5) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.margin = margin(t = -8),
      legend.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "cm"),
      legend.key.width = unit(0.3, "lines"),
      legend.text = element_text(margin = margin(l = 1)),
      panel.grid = element_line(linewidth = .1)
    )

# Convertir le pheatmap en grob
ph2_grob <- patchwork::wrap_elements(ph2$gtable)

# Assembler les trois graphiques
# Option 1 : disposition en L (heatmap à gauche, biplots empilés à droite)
layout <- "
AA
BC
"

combined <- ph2_grob + g2 + g3 +
  plot_layout(design = layout, heights = c(1.5, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Analyse fonctionnelle - AMR EHPAD FQ",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14))
  )

combined

```
